name: Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation via Masqueraded XML
description: Detection of a scheduled task created using schtasks.exe with an XML file, where the XML file's extension appears to be masqueraded or non-standard, indicating potential covert persistence or code execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the suspicious scheduled task was created.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process image (schtasks.exe) that created the scheduled task.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of schtasks.exe, including the XML file path.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that created the scheduled task.

parameters.name: IntegrityLevel
parameters.description: The integrity level of the process that created the scheduled task (e.g., High, Medium, System).

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the scheduled task was created.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
